untranslatable_reason: Signal requires precise Fibonacci retracement calculation (50-62% of prior upmove from C to D), trendline detection, and belt hold candlestick pattern recognition. These require multi-bar lookback logic and geometric calculations not supported by available indicators. Specifically: (1) Fibonacci levels require identifying swing highs/lows and calculating exact retracement percentages dynamically, (2) Trendline overhead resistance requires line-fitting algorithm, (3) Belt hold pattern requires specific candlestick sequence analysis (tall white candle followed by tall black candle). Available indicators cannot express these geometric/pattern-matching requirements.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using: close > sma_20 (uptrend recovery), body_pct < 0.5 (avoiding strong reversals), close > pivot (resistance breakout). However, this does NOT capture the core logic: Fibonacci retracement identification, trendline resistance confirmation, or belt hold negation. A proper implementation requires custom pattern recognition logic outside the backtest engine's indicator scope.
